title: quick-mlg
description: Auto MLG water bucket placement mod for safer landings in Minecraft.
body:
# AutoMLG

**AutoMLG** automatically places water buckets when falling from heights to prevent fall damage.

## Features

This client-side Fabric mod helps you perform MLG water clutches reliably. Simply have a water bucket in your hotbar and **look straight down** – the mod will handle the timing and placement when you're falling.

## Usage

Perfect for _survival gameplay_ and _casual play_. 

### Important Note

Always check server rules before using on multiplayer servers. Some servers may not allow client-side mods like this.
